scene_description: A gray table holds a bag of chips, a plastic bottle, and an opened soda can.

candidates.rationale: The pull tab is visible and the drinking opening of the can is clearly exposed.
The bottle is lying horizontally on its side rather than standing on its base.

scene_description: A silver laptop, a mug holding a pen, and a fire extinguisher are resting on a white countertop above a wooden cabinet.

candidates.rationale: The laptop lid is folded down onto the keyboard section, indicating it is closed.
The pen is visibly placed inside the mug serving as a container.

scene_description: A robotic arm is positioned over a countertop containing a dark bottle and two sealed snack bags inside a cardboard tray.

candidates.rationale: The orange and yellow plastic packaging of the snack bag is clearly intact and factory sealed.
The cap is visibly secured and screwed onto the top of the bottle.

scene_description: A robotic arm views several objects, including a stuffed animal and a plastic bag, resting on a white table.

candidates.rationale: The bag is visibly crumpled and its opening is exposed, showing an orange object inside.
The stuffed animal is lying flat on the white table surface.

scene_description: A robot gripper is positioned over a white table containing several Play-Doh containers and a spice jar inside a plastic bag.

candidates.rationale: The purple lid is visibly removed and sitting next to the container body.
The orange lid is visibly screwed onto the top of the jar.

scene_description: A robotic arm overlooks a cluttered scene featuring a bed, a couch, and a white cardboard box containing various items.

candidates.rationale: The bed sheets and covers are rumpled and not neatly arranged, indicating the bed is unmade.
The large white pillow resting on the bed appears visibly clean and free of obvious stains or dirt.

scene_description: A robot arm is positioned over a desk cluttered with various objects including books, containers, and packages.

candidates.rationale: The cardboard package is secured with tape around all visible edges, indicating it is sealed.
The textbook is lying flat on the desk with its front cover completely closed.

scene_description: A robotic arm is positioned over a toy kitchen set which features a pot, a bowl, and a pan.

candidates.rationale: The grey pot on the counter has its matching lid placed completely on top of it.
The door of the toy microwave unit is visually shut.

scene_description: A close-up view of a child's toy kitchen set featuring a stove, sink, and various cooking accessories.

candidates.rationale: A black lid is visibly placed on top of the gray cooking pot on the stove.
No water is visible flowing from the spout of the faucet.
